title: CT3.N01 completed discharge record — Input — boundaried piece X with interface data
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for CT3.N01, the input node “Input — boundaried piece X with interface data” of tactic CT3 (External-type compression). It refines the common node-proof record with this node's exact identity, completion state, assigned contract evidence, and any required payload or terminal certificate.

tacticId.description: Framework tactic discriminator for CT3.N01. It must be exactly `CT3`, selecting External-type compression (external type) as the tactic that owns the input step “Input — boundaried piece X with interface data” in the exhaustive proof flow.

nodeId.description: Stable graph-node identifier for the obligation “Input — boundaried piece X with interface data”. It must be exactly `CT3.N01` so the evidence, dependencies, outgoing branch, and any terminal result are attributed to this step rather than another node.

nodeNumber.description: One-based ordinal of CT3.N01 within tactic CT3 (External-type compression). It must be exactly 1, matching the N01 suffix and the node's position in that tactic graph.

status.description: Required completion state for CT3.N01. It must be exactly `validated`, meaning that the node's certificate, trigger, or other validation obligation has been checked for the input obligation “Input — boundaried piece X with interface data”; another lifecycle value does not discharge this concrete node.

dischargedContracts.description: Contract identifiers whose proof obligations are discharged at CT3.N01. The array must contain `S-Trig`; these are precisely the contracts assigned to “Input — boundaried piece X with interface data”. Listing an identifier records discharge status but does not replace the matching typed evidence record required in `contractInstances`.

contains.description: Requires `S-Trig` to occur in CT3.N01's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that checks that a payload supplies the receiving tactic's trigger, arity, interfaces, and standing hypotheses for the obligation “Input — boundaried piece X with interface data”.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract-evidence records that justify CT3.N01 from the recorded branch state. The array must contain at least one instance for every assigned schema: S-Trig (payloadId, consumerTacticId, expectedArity, componentChecks, standingHypotheses, interfaceChecks, certificateHandleChecks, evidence). Every instance must include its schema discriminator and nonempty evidence as required by the referenced contract definition; together the records must establish the displayed node statement.

schema.description: Contract discriminator for a `S-Trig` evidence instance at CT3.N01. It must be exactly `S-Trig`, identifying the contract that checks that a payload supplies the receiving tactic's trigger, arity, interfaces, and standing hypotheses; the same instance must supply payloadId, consumerTacticId, expectedArity, componentChecks, standingHypotheses, interfaceChecks, certificateHandleChecks, evidence.

statement.informal: Validate or verify: Input — boundaried piece X with interface data

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Provide a proof/definition/computation artifact that establishes the displayed statement from the recorded branch state and satisfies every listed contract schema.
